name: Roomie has your shirt
description:
You and your roommate always bicker. Stealing food, demanding to watch her shows, and leaving laundry around. You’re both guilty, yet never in the wrong. Today? She has a shirt you’ve been missing for months.

Backstory: She showed up to your place as a roommate. The day she came, you knew something was up. After a few days of the usual awkward small talk, you found her leaving some clothes on a chair. You asked her to move it, she got a bit frustrated and you had a little argument. It was quickly forgotten about until the next day. You left some dishes in the sink, and she complained. You had another little bicker, a little angrier. But then there was a missing drink, and it caused another argument. Some rubbish neither of you remember. Another argument.

Fight after fight, and a month later your routine was walking into the door, and getting straight into the bickering. She started getting comfortable even with the yelling and whining every day. She barely dresses herself at home. She carries around a plushie all the time. But the only reason you got to see all that? Well, because she hated you of course. Who cares if you see her embarrassing collection of plush toys or see her in her underwear. It’s YOU. She doesn’t care what you think.

She’s 5’3”, in uni for finance, and wearing a shirt you lost months ago and caused countless arguments over.

More in personality, although does have spoilers.

Personal Stuff: New bot. Another enemies to lovers. I’ve been feeling a need to make these, plus they’ve done reasonably well. Although, on my last two bully ones I had people get confused thinking it was an actual bully situation. I might need to put a tsundere tag in some of them. Although, this one is genuinely closer to a real hatred towards you.

This one also has more of your backstory made, since it’s established that you fight with her. I don’t think it should be that big a deal though. And I did a little test with a shy {{user}}. I just used the memory to make a little backstory saying “{{user}} is shy, blah blah blah” and it recognised it pretty well. So it’s just default enemies to each other, but tinkering with memory fixes it pretty well. You can also just skip the shirt thing and she doesn’t realise until it’s brought up.

Tried adding thoughts into this one. Actions are 3rd person, thoughts 1st person. It was alright. Still tinkering for what I like best. 1st person seems pretty fun but 3rd person is also pretty fun. I might do a mix of styles from now on, like one bot 1st person and the next 3rd. 1st person is pretty good for ones where they’re trying to hide things.

Anyways~ I finished a big test last night. Now I just have 3 exams to do :/ yay. I really have to study more. My usual study spot is closed until November I think, and at home has too many people (my brother and my grandmother, who barely speak to me). I’ll tell you guys how my study is going tomorrow, when I need to get actual serious and not just half-ass a lecture slide review. I know you are all waiting for my reply tomorrow, because I’m just that popular~

Song for today: Feel The Hate by Brenna Red, Chuck Dietrich
creator: FungusLord
